caption:
Anthropic and Micron have formed a strategic agreement to advance AI infrastructure. The partnership focuses on developing memory architectures, with Micron supplying High-Bandwidth Memory and other products. This collaboration aims to enhance performance and energy efficiency in AI workloads. 1

How will this impact AI technology?

Sources: The Decoder, Globe Newswire

plan.caption:
Anthropic and Micron have formed a strategic agreement to advance AI infrastructure. The partnership focuses on developing memory architectures, with Micron supplying High-Bandwidth Memory and other products. This collaboration aims to enhance performance and energy efficiency in AI workloads. 1

How will this impact AI technology?

Sources: The Decoder, Globe Newswire

slides.headline: ANTHROPIC AND MICRON JUST ANNOUNCED AN AI MEMORY DEAL
slides.sub: This agreement was announced on June 22, 2026.
slides.image_prompt: A close-up of two engineers discussing plans over a table, papers and blueprints spread out, with a high-tech environment in the background, soft lighting.

slides.headline: THE DEAL INCLUDES A MULTI-YEAR SUPPLY CONTRACT FOR MEMORY PRODUCTS
slides.sub: Micron will provide High-Bandwidth Memory, DRAM, and SSDs.
slides.image_prompt: An array of memory chips displayed on a table, highlighting various high-tech components, with engineers in the background working on a computer.

slides.headline: CLAUDE WILL BE ROLLED OUT INSIDE MICRON FOR AUTOMATION TASKS
slides.sub: Claude is used internally by Micron for coding and manufacturing processes.
slides.image_prompt: A technician programming a machine in a manufacturing plant, with advanced machinery and screens displaying data, daylight streaming through windows.

slides.headline: CRITICS RAISE CONCERNS ABOUT POTENTIAL CIRCULAR ARRANGEMENTS
slides.sub: Micron's investment in Anthropic raises questions about conflicts of interest.
slides.image_prompt: A concerned group of analysts discussing over a conference table, charts and graphs projected on a screen, with serious expressions.

slides.headline: THIS DEAL COULD SIGNIFICANTLY IMPACT AI MEMORY ARCHITECTURE
slides.sub: Micron's stock has surged over 1,000% in the past year.
slides.image_prompt: A bustling tech office environment with people collaborating, computer screens showing data, and a sense of innovation in the air.

story.title: Anthropic and Micron want to co-design AI memory architecture
